name: Cemas Dokum Sanayi A.S.
summary: √É¬áemas D√É¬∂k√É¬ºm Sanayi Anonim Sirketi provides alloyed grinding products for the cement and mining industries. It offers gear and transmission boxes, axe cases, spring connection parts; and exhaust manifold gaskets, brackets, supports, brake discs and thimbles, clutch pressure plates and frames, suspension arms, ball joints, steering connection plates, flywheels, flywheel bodies and coverings, crankshafts, water pump bodies and components, air conditioner parts, drums, hubs, motor connection clamps, spring bearings, motor caps, front supports, planet gears, brake pistons, etc., as well as hydraulic, front gear, differential, thermostat, regulator, and balancing bodies. The company also produces cast parts for use in the manufacture, machining, and assembly of white goods, such as washing machine roller bearings, and compressor bodies and cranks for refrigerators. In addition, it offers machining parts for industrial, marine, construction, boiler, compressor, hydraulic pump, heavy construction equipment, and other sectors. The company was founded in 1976 and is based in Kirsehir, Turkey.
